heading: Cost-plus contracting prohibited for military construction and military family housing projects
label: 3323 Cost-plus contracting prohibited for military construction and military family housing projects

children.heading: .—Prohibition
children.label: a .—Prohibition
children.text: A contract entered into by the United States in connection with a military construction project or a military family housing project may not use any form of cost-plus contracting.
is in addition to the prohibition specified in on the use of the cost-plus-a-percentage-of-cost system of contracting; andsection 3322(a) of this title

applies notwithstanding a declaration of war or the declaration by the President of a national emergency under section 201 of the National Emergencies Act () that includes the use of the armed forces.50 U.S.C. 1621
